dataset.name: UNISA Bachelor's Degrees for Chamu
dataset.purpose: AI-assisted qualification discovery and admission matching
dataset.important_warning: UNISA admission pages and application availability can change. The exact official qualification page must override group-level matching guidance.

degree_entry.NSC: Requires a degree endorsement plus programme-specific subject results.
degree_entry.Senior_Certificate: Requires matriculation exemption or eligibility for exemption.
degree_entry.NCV_Level_4: Must grant admission to bachelor's degree studies and satisfy programme-specific requirements.

global_rules.selection: Admission is not automatic even when minimum requirements are met.
global_rules.stream_handling: Qualification code and stream code together form the unique programme identifier.
global_rules.application_status: Do not permanently store open/closed status in this dataset; retrieve it from a current UNISA source.

qualification.name: Bachelor of Accounting Sciences in Financial Accounting (Revised Curriculum 2020)
qualification.display_name: Bachelor of Accounting Sciences in Financial Accounting (Revised Curriculum 2020) (98302 - FA1)
qualification.college: College of Accounting Sciences

language_of_teaching_and_learning.confidence: high for UNISA bachelor-degree routes; confirm on qualification page

Senior Certificate.endorsement: Matriculation exemption or eligibility for exemption
Senior Certificate.language_requirement: Usually D on Higher Grade or C on Standard Grade

NCV_Level_4.rule: Must grant admission to bachelor's degree studies and satisfy programme-specific subject requirements

admission.selection_note: Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission; selection depends on available spaces and UNISA's selection process.

mathematics.confidence: group-level guidance only; verify exact qualification page

evaluate_in_order: Confirm NSC degree endorsement or another recognised degree-entry route
Calculate UNISA APS
Check language of teaching and learning result
Check Mathematics or Mathematical Literacy rule for the exact qualification
Check qualification or stream-specific subject requirements
Check practical, technology and location requirements
Return manual_review where an official requirement has not been verified
never_do: Do not treat APS alone as proof of eligibility
Do not treat Mathematical Literacy as equivalent to Mathematics unless the official page allows it
Do not merge different stream codes under the same qualification code

technology_requirements: Webcam may be required for some assessments

funding.note: Funding depends on the learner, qualification, registration load and current NSFAS rules.

data_quality.nqf_level_and_credit_structure: standard UNISA bachelor's structure; verify unusual exceptions
data_quality.aps: verified at group or qualification level where available; exact page should remain authoritative
data_quality.subject_requirements: manual verification required where not explicitly confirmed
